sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97588" key="sugkakopaqe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγκᾰκοπᾰθέω</orth>, <sense id="n97588.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">partake in sufferings</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg016.perseus-grc1:1:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">2 Ep.Ti.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
